description: German e-invoicing MCP server: ZUGFeRD 2.x, XRechnung 3.x, EN 16931, KoSIT validation, Peppol.
name: io.github.cmendezs/mcp-einvoicing-de

environmentVariables.description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO (default), WARNING, or ERROR
environmentVariables.name: EINVOICING_DE_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: URL of a self-hosted KoSIT validation tool REST endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:8080/api/v1/validate). When set, remote KoSIT validation is enabled; when absent, local Schematron validation is used.
environmentVariables.name: EINVOICING_DE_KOSIT_VALIDATOR_URL
